recommendations.title: True Confessions
recommendations.overview: A cop clashes with his priest brother while investigating the brutal murder of a young prostitute.

recommendations.title: The Deep End of the Ocean
recommendations.overview: A three-year-old boy disappears during his mother's high school reunion. Nine years later, by chance, he turns up in the town in which the family has just relocated.

recommendations.title: Straight Time
recommendations.overview: After being released on parole, a burglar attempts to go straight, get a regular job, and just go by the rules. He soon finds himself back in jail at the hands of a power-hungry parole officer.

recommendations.title: Love, Rosie

recommendations.title: The Irishman

recommendations.title: Everybody's Fine

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.
